stories.headline: Jelly Roll Files for Divorce From Bunnie XO After Nearly 10 Years of Marriage - Billboard
stories.summary: Jelly Roll has filed for divorce from his wife Bunnie XO, ending their nearly decade-long marriage, according to court documents obtained by TMZ.

stories.headline: DMV artist turns belts into a conversation about discipline - NPR
stories.summary: Multidisciplinary artist Lex Marie has gone viral on TikTok and Instagram for her artwork confronting discipline within Black households.

stories.headline: Chris Tucker Reveals He’s Been Celibate For 3 Years at Secret Vegas Gig - TMZ
stories.summary: Chris Tucker says he's been celibate for more than three years and is holding out for marriage ... a revelation he shared during a comedy set in Las Vegas … TMZ has learned.

stories.headline: ‘Kiki’s Delivery Service’ Live-Action Series Set at BBC Studios, Kadokawa and Wheel in Motion - Variety
stories.summary: BBC Studios Kids & Family, Wheel in Motion and Kadokawa are developing a 10-episode live-action "Kiki's Delivery Service" series.

stories.headline: Horoscope for Tuesday, June 16, 2026 - Chicago Sun-Times
Corey Feldman hospitalized after medical emergency on flight - Yahoo
stories.summary: "Gremlins" and "Stand by Me" actor Corey Feldman, 54, was met by paramedics after landing at LAX on June 15, his publicist confirmed to USA TODAY.

stories.headline: Maine restaurateur Dana Street wins James Beard Award - The Portland Press Herald
stories.summary: The founder of Fore Street, Scales, Standard Baking Co., and Street and Co., all in Portland, took home the Outstanding Restaurateur award.

stories.headline: Los Angeles Won Big at the 2026 James Beard Awards - Eater Los Angeles
stories.summary: The city took home awards for Best Chef California, Outstanding Wine and Other Beverages Program, and Outstanding Hospitality
